2026-04-06T17:13:38.8326186Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-06T17:13:38.8326569Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-06T17:13:38.8326894Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T17:13:38.8327130Z [36;1m[0m
